channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Igbo-Eze South Chairman Congratulates Governor Peter Mbah on Becoming APC Governorship Candidate
item.description: The Chairman of Igbo-Eze South Local Government Area in Enugu State, Ugo Ferdinand Ukwueze, don hail Governor Peter Mbah for winning the APC governorship ticket for Enugu State for 2027 election. Acco...

item.title: Bengali actors face police inquiries linked to 2021 post-poll violence after BJP wins West Bengal
item.description: Following the Bharatiya Janata Party's victory in the 2026 West Bengal Assembly elections, ending 15 years of Trinamool Congress rule, prominent Bengali actors, including Parambrata Chatterjee and Swa...

item.title: Governor Ron DeSantis Avoids Questions About Trump's Anti-Weaponization Fund
item.description: Florida Governor Ron DeSantis was captured on video attempting to avoid questions from reporters regarding President Donald Trump's $1.776 billion 'Anti-Weaponization Fund.' The fund, established as a...

item.title: DDoS Attacks Disrupt South African Internet Services
item.description: South Africa has recently faced a series of distributed denial-of-service (DDoS) attacks that targeted major internet service providers, including 1-Grid, Seacom, Xneelo and Network Platforms. These a...

item.title: Nintendo Plans to Manufacture 20 Million Switch 2 Consoles in FY27 Amid Cost Pressures
item.description: Nintendo has announced plans to manufacture up to 20 million Switch 2 consoles during fiscal year 2027, exceeding its previous shipment forecast by approximately 21%. Sources indicate that despite ear...

item.title: Trump's attempt to ban Dominion voting machines fails over insufficient security evidence
item.description: A recent effort by former President Donald Trump's administration to ban Dominion Voting Systems machines across the United States has collapsed due to a lack of evidence supporting alleged security r...

item.title: Floyd Mayweather Sues Former Business Advisor Over $175 Million Alleged Fraud
item.description: Floyd Mayweather Jr., the undefeated American boxing champion, has filed a lawsuit against his former business advisor, Jona Rechnitz, alleging the theft of at least $175 million. The complaint, submi...

item.title: Tanzania Strengthens Economic Plans to Handle Rising Fuel Costs from Gulf Instability
item.description: Tanzania is making careful plans to deal with the problems coming from the instability in the Gulf region. This situation is causing higher prices for fuel, freight, and other important inputs. The Mi...

item.title: Ogun State Launches Renewed Hope Ward Development Programme for Monthly Cash Interventions to Residents
item.description: Governor Dapo Abiodun of Ogun State has announced a big plan to help between 50,000 and 100,000 people across the state with monthly cash support. This one na part of the Renewed Hope Ward Development...

item.title: Creamline and Cignal deliver thrilling performance in Finals Game 2
item.description: The Premier Volleyball League (PVL) Finals Game 2 between Creamline and Cignal has been widely praised as one of the most exciting matches of the season. Fans witnessed a thrilling showdown filled wit...

item.title: Joanne Walker completes 163km Ultra-Trail Australia with family support
item.description: Joanne Walker tackled one of Australia's most grueling endurance challenges, the Ultra-Trail Australia 100-mile race, covering 163km and over 7,000 metres of elevation through the Blue Mountains. The ...

item.title: Kim Chiu and Yam Concepcion Portray Rival Stepsisters in 'Love Thy Woman' (2020)
item.description: In a throwback to 2020, ABS-CBN highlights the memorable roles of Kim Chiu and Yam Concepcion as the rival Wong stepsisters in the hit drama series 'Love Thy Woman.' The show, which aired on Philippin...

item.title: Jean Moral: French Photographer Who Revolutionized Fashion Photography with Natural, Spontaneous Style
item.description: Jean Moral (1906–1999) was a groundbreaking French photographer and illustrator who changed fashion photography in the 1930s by moving away from stiff studio poses. Instead, he photographed models, es...

item.title: Edmonton Outlines Major Infrastructure Projects for 2026, Including Wellington Bridge and Valley Line West LRT
item.description: The City of Edmonton has announced its major construction priorities for 2026, highlighting the Wellington Bridge and the Valley Line West LRT as central projects. The Wellington Bridge, a key transpo...

item.title: Antonelli Tops Times in Disrupted Canadian Grand Prix Practice Session
item.description: Mercedes’ Kimi Antonelli set the pace in the only practice session for the Canadian Grand Prix sprint weekend, showing strong performance with the team’s first major upgrades of the season. The 19-yea...

item.title: Tanzania Construction Ministry to Implement Parliamentary Budget Recommendations for 2026-27
item.description: Tanzania’s Construction Minister Abdallah Ulega has confirmed that his ministry go review and act on the proposals given by members of parliament during the 2026/27 budget talks. The MPs raised issues...

item.title: Rivers Civil Servants Urge Government to Review Pension Scheme and Retirement Terms
item.description: The Rivers State Council of Nigeria Civil Service Union don dey press the state government make dem scrap the contributory pension scheme wey dem talk say no dey favourable for long-serving civil serv...

item.title: Five Men Injured in Daytime Stabbing Incident in Acton, London; Suspect Arrested
item.description: A man has been taken into custody following a stabbing incident involving five men on Horn Lane, Acton, West London, on Friday afternoon. Four of the victims, aged 20, 22, 42 and 47, were transported ...

item.title: Montreal author Chanel Sutherland refutes AI claims over Commonwealth Prize-winning story
item.description: Montreal-based author Chanel Sutherland has faced controversy after her Commonwealth Prize-winning short story, Descend, was flagged by an AI detection service as predominantly AI-generated. Sutherlan...

item.title: ICC confirms Duterte should remain in detention due to risk of fleeing
item.description: The International Criminal Court (ICC) has decided to uphold the detention of former Philippine President Rodrigo Duterte, citing concerns that he presents a higher risk of absconding if released. Thi...
